cta.title: Let's Find the Right Funding for Your Business
cta.subtitle: Contact us for a free consultation and funding assessment.

hero.title: Business Funding Options
hero.subtitle: Discover tax incentives, funding support, and finance options available for commercial solar installations in Ireland.

helpSection.title: We Help You Maximise Every Benefit Available
paragraphs: Navigating business tax incentives and funding schemes can be complex. Our team has extensive experience helping businesses access all available benefits, ensuring you minimise your upfront investment.

We provide a comprehensive breakdown of all applicable tax incentives, feed-in tariff projections, and finance options as part of your free consultation — so you can make an informed decision with full visibility of costs and savings.

items.desc: Write off 100% of the cost of qualifying energy-efficient equipment against your corporation tax in the first year. This significantly reduces the effective cost of your solar investment.
items.title: Accelerated Capital Allowance

items.desc: SEAI offers grants and supports for businesses investing in energy efficiency and renewable energy. Contact us to find out what grants your business may qualify for.
items.title: SEAI Business Grants

items.desc: Earn money for surplus electricity your business exports back to the grid. This provides an ongoing income stream alongside your energy savings.
items.title: Feed-in Tariffs

items.desc: We work with leading finance providers to offer flexible commercial lending solutions. Asset finance, leasing, and green loans are all available for qualifying businesses.
items.title: Commercial Finance Options
